features: Secure Wig Hold with Adjustable Fit Designed to keep your wig firmly in place, this adjustable melt band wraps comfortably around your head, helping melt lace and secure edges without slipping or pulling.

2-Pack with Stylish Black & Pink Bow Design Includes 2 unique bands in chic black and pink bow prints—perfect for everyday wear or styling on-the-go. Adds a touch of fun and fashion to your hair routine.

3cm Wide for Maximum Coverage & Control The ideal width for edge laying, this 3cm melt band offers full forehead coverage to help flatten flyaways, lay baby hairs, and blend your lace seamlessly into your hairline.
Soft, Elastic & Reusable Material Made with high-quality elastic that’s both stretchable and gentle on the scalp. Easy to wash and reuse, this wig band delivers consistent performance with every use.

Great for All Hair Types & Genders Whether you’re a woman or man, beginner or pro, these melt bands work with all hair textures—curly, straight, natural, or relaxed. Ideal for lace front wigs, closures, and edge styling.
description: Product description Adjustable Wig Bands for a Secure, Sleek Look This 2-piece adjustable wig band set is designed to help lay your edges flat and hold your wig securely in place. Featuring stylish black and pink bow prints, these 3cm-wide elastic bands are perfect for melting lace front wigs and achieving a flawless, natural hairline. Comfortable, Stretchy & Reusable Melt Bands Crafted with high-quality elastic material, these melt bands are soft, flexible, and gentle on your edges. They’re easy to adjust for a custom fit and reusable for everyday styling—whether you're wearing wigs, lace closures, or just laying your baby hairs. Ideal for Daily Use & All Hair Types Perfect for both women and men, these wig bands work well with all hair textures. Whether you’re a professional stylist or doing your own hair at home, this tool is a must-have for seamless wig installation, edge styling, or keeping your hair in place overnight. Safety Warning NO
